meta.name: Wave 1g — European Cup semi-finalists 1955-56 to 1969-70 (pickable)
meta.note: Promotes 30 1950s-60s European Cup semi-finalist club-seasons to full pickable squads, completing the entire EC era. Documented giants conf B; deep-tail sides conf C (spine accurate, fringe approximate). Busby Babes spine web-verified. Decoys auto-selected from era/league reserves.
